svg.text: New England Select Board / Town Meeting Form of Government
Role title per seat (if role-titled board)
Staff report / memo attachment per item
Entry / return to open session timestamps
Filter by board, date, item type
Vote method: voice/show of hands/secret ballot/counted
Maine FOIA / Records Retention (permanently locked approved minutes)
Robert's Rules (loose baseline — motion / seconder / vote)
ADA / WCAG 2.1 AA (public portal & generated documents)
Town Meeting Manager · New England Select Board / Town Meeting Form of Government · Maine-first, New England-expandable
Target: Towns 1,000–5,000 · SaaS pricing $600–$1,200/year · Open core model
